data_deps.name: neural-solver-library
data_deps.description: FNO airfoil/pipe/Darcy/NS/plasticity, PDEBench, mlcfd, AirfRANS, AirCraft.

install_cmds: apt-get -o APT::Sandbox::User=root update -q && DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get -o APT::Sandbox::User=root install -y git wget unzip && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
pip install h5py scipy scikit-learn timm einops seaborn pyvista sympy nystrom_attention vtk
pip install torch-scatter torch-sparse torch-cluster torch-geometric -f https://data.pyg.org/whl/torch-2.5.0+cu121.html
